metadata.description: Security controls per layer with implementation status

layers.description: API MARH integration and request validation

controls.name: IAM Authentication
controls.description: Lambda Function URL with IAM Auth or AWS SDK invocation with IAM role
controls.implementation: Lambda resource policy restricting to API MARH role ARN

controls.name: JSON Schema Validation
controls.description: Validate request payload against defined schema before processing
controls.implementation: jsonschema library in Lambda, reject malformed requests with 400

controls.name: Payload Size Limit
controls.description: Reject requests exceeding 64KB
controls.implementation: Check content-length header; Lambda Function URL has 6MB limit inherently

controls.name: Rate Limiting
controls.description: Throttle requests per user (10/min) and per company (100/min)
controls.implementation: In-memory rate limiter (POC); DynamoDB or ElastiCache (production)

controls.name: Context Extraction
controls.description: Extract user context (company_id, role, permissions) from request payload
controls.implementation: Parse context from API MARH payload; user already authenticated by API MARH

controls.name: Role-Based Access
controls.description: Restrict intents and data access based on user role (admin/rh/colaborador)
controls.implementation: Permission matrix checking role against allowed intents

controls.name: No Privilege Escalation
controls.description: Agent never returns data that user wouldn't see in official journey
controls.implementation: Pass user context to ma-hr-orch; API enforces access control

controls.name: Secrets Manager
controls.description: Store all secrets (API keys, tokens) in AWS Secrets Manager
controls.implementation: boto3 secretsmanager client; cache in Lambda memory during lifecycle

controls.name: KMS Encryption
controls.description: CMK for S3 documents and Secrets Manager envelope encryption
controls.implementation: 3 CMKs: marh-agent-s3, marh-agent-secrets, marh-agent-logs

controls.name: IAM Least Privilege
controls.description: Lambda role with minimum required permissions only
controls.implementation: Explicit allow for: bedrock:InvokeModel, bedrock:Retrieve, s3:GetObject, secretsmanager:GetSecretValue, kms:Decrypt, logs:*, xray:*

controls.name: No Hardcoded Secrets
controls.description: No secrets in code, environment variables, or logs
controls.implementation: Code review checklist; .gitignore for .env files; scan in CI

controls.name: PII Removal from Input
controls.description: Scan user message for PII (CPF, email, phone, card) and replace with placeholders
controls.implementation: Regex-based scanner: CPF, email, phone, card number patterns

controls.name: API Response Allowlist
controls.description: Only allowlisted fields from ma-hr-orch response pass to LLM
controls.implementation: Allowlist dictionary per endpoint; unknown fields are discarded

controls.name: Schema Validation (Response)
controls.description: Validate ma-hr-orch response against expected schema before processing
controls.implementation: pydantic models or jsonschema for each endpoint response

controls.name: Data Classification
controls.description: Classify all data fields by sensitivity level
controls.implementation: Documented classification table; enforced in code via allowlist

controls.name: Anti-Prompt Injection
controls.description: System prompt with identity anchor and anti-manipulation instructions
controls.implementation: Clear system/user separation; instruction to ignore user attempts to change behavior

controls.name: Output Validation (PII Re-scan)
controls.description: Re-scan LLM output for PII before returning to user
controls.implementation: Same regex patterns as input sanitization applied to output

controls.name: URL Allowlist
controls.description: Only Alelo domain URLs allowed in output
controls.implementation: Extract URLs from response; remove any non-alelo.com.br URLs

controls.name: Anti-System Prompt Leak
controls.description: Prevent model from revealing system prompt content
controls.implementation: Detection patterns for common leak attempts; instruction in system prompt

controls.name: GET-Only Tool Use
controls.description: Only GET operations allowed; no write/delete/update tools
controls.implementation: Hardcoded HTTP method in client; no PUT/POST/DELETE/PATCH allowed

controls.name: Endpoint Allowlist
controls.description: Only pre-defined ma-hr-orch endpoints can be called
controls.implementation: Hardcoded list of allowed endpoints; reject any dynamic URL

layers.description: Network security and encryption in transit

controls.name: HTTPS Everywhere
controls.description: All communications use HTTPS (TLS 1.2+)
controls.implementation: AWS SDK defaults to HTTPS; httpx client with verify=True

controls.name: No VPC (POC)
controls.description: Lambda outside VPC; uses HTTPS regional endpoints
controls.implementation: Default Lambda configuration; no VPC attachment

controls.name: Destination Allowlist (Code)
controls.description: Only known AWS endpoints and ma-hr-orch URL are called
controls.implementation: Hardcoded base URLs; no dynamic URL construction from user/model input

controls.name: No PII in Logs
controls.description: Sanitize all log entries before writing to CloudWatch
controls.implementation: Log sanitizer function; never log raw user messages or API responses

controls.name: Security Event Logging
controls.description: Log all security-relevant events (rate limit, injection attempt, auth failure)
controls.implementation: Structured JSON logs with event types for security events

controls.name: CloudTrail
controls.description: API-level audit trail for all AWS service calls
controls.implementation: Enable CloudTrail in account (if not already enabled)
